about.title: Why Choose Us
about.subtitle: Designed for Gamers, Students & Creators
about.description: Tech Komputer Store is here to meet the needs of quality technology devices at a reasonable price. We understand that every dollar counts for you.
reasons: Original products with official warranty from leading brands
Competitive prices that are friendly to students and learners
Special curation for gaming & content creation needs
about.story_desc: Building a community of gamers and creators with the best gear since 2020.
about.mission_desc: Providing high-quality gaming peripherals and technology at affordable prices for all, especially students and content creators in Indonesia.
about.vision_desc: To be the #1 trusted online gaming peripheral store in Indonesia that prioritizes product quality, tech education, and best customer service.
about.values_desc: Integrity, innovation, and community. We believe that technology should be accessible to everyone without sacrificing quality.
about.team_desc: A passionate team dedicated to providing the best shopping experience.
about.cta_desc: Explore our best collection of gaming peripherals and find the one that fits you.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.desc: Our team is here to help anytime
